intervention_reason: Unity Editor/CLI and GitHub CLI are unavailable in this execution environment, so scene/asset auto-generation, GameCI runtime verification, and remote repo creation/push must be completed in a Unity+GitHub-enabled environment.
notes: Environment/tooling observed: git 2.39.5 (Apple Git-154), git-lfs 3.7.1, Homebrew 5.0.13, gh 2.87.3 (not authenticated), dotnet SDK 8.0.124 (dotnet@8 formula), no Unity binary found. Decisions: (1) scaffolded a Unity-compatible repository manually with Stage 1 runtime systems; (2) added editor automation to generate Ground Floor ScriptableObjects and required scenes plus iOS IL2CPP settings when opened in Unity; (3) configured GameCI workflows for tests/build and dotnet-format linting; (4) set StandaloneOSX build as CI proxy target; (5) included LFS tracking for key Unity asset types; (6) installed tooling needed for local lint verification and validated lint script execution; (7) recorded blockers for remote GitHub operations and CI pass verification in this environment.
